title: Secret Rooms REMASTERED
description: Adds Blocks That Make Your Rooms Extra Secret!
body:
# Secret Rooms
## What This Mod Offers:
- 3 Variants Of Each Block (Stone, Cobblestone, Oak Planks)
- Ghost Blocks (Blocks You Can Walk / Fall Through)
- Camo Doors (Doors That Fit In With The Environment)
- Fake Walls (One Side Of The Wall Is Real, The Other Is Invisible)
- Crafting Recipes For Each Block + Each Blocks Varients

## Coming Next Update:
- More Variants 
- Different Blocks (MAYBE)

If You Have Any Issues With The Mod DM Me On Discord: MythicalRev
